title: OP Mod
body:
# ⚠️ DISCONTINUTINY
This mod is being discontinued and being replaced by the incoming mod called Lamp Client.
You can still download the mod but it wont get any updates anymore. We hope you migrate!

# 🤩 Make Minecraft easier with a mod menu you have never seen before!
Get access to many posibilities like flying in survival mode, duping items with a command, and even being immortal! (Look into gallery for all options)

# 📁 Installation Process
1. Make sure you have installed Fabric 1.20.1
2. Install the mod and Fabric API
3. Launch the game and bind "OP GUI" to a key
4. Launch the world and press the binded key to open the GUI!
